## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo test` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy` has zero warnings
- [ ] `cargo fmt` has been run
- [ ] New rules have a verified CWE reference
- [ ] New rules have vulnerable + safe fixtures in `tests/fixtures/`
- [ ] No hardcoded values (version, rule count, etc.)
